svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(244, 244, 244), rgb(27, 27, 27)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(189, 189, 189), rgb(75, 75, 75));
fill: light-dark(rgb(244, 244, 244), rgb(27, 27, 27)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(189, 189, 189), rgb(75, 75, 75));
fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 193, 130), rgb(48, 102, 48));
fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(180, 143, 207), rgb(124, 92, 147));
